dorsal.description: top-down/dorsal view showing the bee from above
dorsal.details: Clear view of thorax and abdomen coloration, wings visible from above

lateral.description: side profile/lateral view showing the bee from the side
lateral.details: Body profile, leg structure, wing position, side coloration visible

frontal.description: front-facing or 45-degree angled view showing the face
frontal.details: Face features, head coloration, eye structure, frontal body view

characteristics: Pollen baskets (corbiculae) visible on hind legs

key_features: Thorax variable, but always with some black between wing bases
T3-5: Black abdomen, sometimes with white/yellow hairs on T5

anatomical_notes.head: Variable coloration, black hairs present
anatomical_notes.thorax: Variable, but always with some black between wing bases
anatomical_notes.abdomen: T1-2 yellow, T3-5 black (sometimes with white/yellow hairs on T5)

typical_backgrounds: Cool, moist habitat with native flowers

key_features: Hair on head almost entirely black
Some white on the back end of the abdomen

anatomical_notes.head: Hair on head almost entirely black
anatomical_notes.abdomen: Some white/pale hairs on back end (T5-T6), rest black
anatomical_notes.wings: Typical bumblebee wings, may be slightly different color due to parasitic nature

key_features: Thorax yellow with black band between wing bases and triangular wedge towards tail
T1: Yellow, T2-3: Orange, T4: Yellow, T5: Black

anatomical_notes.head: Face yellow (distinctive feature)
anatomical_notes.thorax: Yellow with black band between wing bases and triangular black wedge pointing towards tail
anatomical_notes.abdomen: T1 yellow, T2-3 orange (distinctive tri-color), T4 yellow, T5 black
anatomical_notes.legs: Yellow and black coloration matching body
